g[0xF][0X3]=(g[0x15])-(0X2E5A4BD) g[7]=(-(0x11517FF))+(0x1151874) local s=[==[#%#GZ@q>\(KYe⁠Xu6_^YS]==]g[0x4][0X2]=(g[13])-(0X1999b22) g[0XF][0X4]=(-(0Xcb66a2))+(0XCB675D) g[0x12][0X6]=(g[0xa])-(0x388875b) g[0x12][0X3]=(g[0X4][0x3])-(0xF853F1) local function t(u) local v={} u=b(u,"\026","") u=b(u,f(0xE2,g[12][5],g[0xF][6]),"") u=b(u,f(0xe2,g[0XC][0X5],0X8c),"") while g[0x10] do u=b(u,f(0XE2,0X81,0Xa0),"") break end u=b(u,f(0Xef,g[0xf][4],g[0xf][0X3]),"") local w={} local x=0x1 for y=0x1,#u do local z=d(u,y) if z>=g[0x4][0X2] and z<=g[7] then if not(((g[0xC][0x6]) and(g[0X4][0x4]))) then else w[x]=f(z) end x+=0x1 end end u=e(w) local ba=#u local bb=0x1 local bc=0X1 while bb<=ba do local bd=bb+g[0x12][0X6] local be=(bd<=ba) and g[0xc][4] or(ba-bb+0X1) if be==0x0 then break end local bf,bg,bh,bi,bj=d(u,bb,bd) bg=bg or g[0X7];bh=if bh then bh else g[0X7];bi=if bi then bi else g[0x7];bj=if not(not bj) then bj else g[0x7] local bk=((((bf-g[4][0X2])*85+(bg-g[0X4][0X2]))*85+(bh-g[4][0X2]))*0X55+(bi-g[0X4][2]))*0x55+(bj-g[4][0x2]) local bl=bk//0X1000000%g[0x12][0X3] local bm=bk//65536%g[0x12][0x3] local bn=bk//g[0x12][3]%g[0X12][0x3] local bo=bk%g[0x12][3] local bp=f(bl,bm,bn,bo) if be<g[0xc][0X4] then bp=a(bp,1,be-0x1) end v[bc]=bp bc+=1 bb+=g[12][0x4] end return e(v) end g[0x4][5]=(g[0Xc][0X2])-(23830905) g[0X18]=(0x1A6206A)-(0X1a61f9f) local function bq(br,bs) local bt={} local bu=#bs for bv=0X1,#br do local bw=((bv-0X1)%bu)+1 bt[bv]=f((d(br,bv)-d(bs,bw))%g[18][0x3]) end return e(bt) end g[0X4][6]=(0X1d74681)-(0x1d745a1) g[0xC][0X7]=(g[0X9])-(0X32c5b7) g[0X12][0x4]=(g[0XF][0X2])-(0x29461f0) local function bx(by) local bz=d(by,0X1) if bz==0x0 then return a(by,0X2) end local ca={} local cb=0X1 local cc=0x2 local cd=#by while cc<=cd do local ce=d(by,cc) cc+=1 if ce<g[0xC][0X5] then local cf=ce+0X1 while g[11] do for cg=0,cf-0X1 do ca[cb]=a(by,cc+cg,cc+cg) cb+=0x1 end break end cc+=cf elseif ce<0Xc0 then local ch=ce-g[12][7] local ci=d(by,cc) cc+=0x1 local cj=cb-ci for ck=0x0,ch-0x1 do ca[cb]=ca[cj+ck] cb+=0x1 end elseif ce<g[0X4][0X6] then local cl=ce-0xBC local cm=d(by,cc)*g[0X12][0X3]+d(by,cc+0X1) cc+=2 local cn=cb-cm for co=0X0,cl-0x1 do ca[cb]=ca[cn+co] cb+=0x1 end elseif ce==g[4][0X6] then local cp=d(by,cc)+0x24 local cq=d(by,cc+0x1)*g[0X12][0X3]+d(by,cc+0x2) cc+=g[4][5] local cr=cb-cq for cs=0x0,cp-0x1 do ca[cb]=ca[cr+cs] cb+=0X1 end else local ct=d(by,cc)+g[0x12][0x6] local cu=a(by,cc+0x1,cc+0X1) cc+=0X2 for cv=0,ct-0X1 do ca[cb]=cu cb+=1 end end end return e(ca) end local cw=bx(bq(t(r),t(s))) g[8]=(g[0X13])-(10660643) if d(cw,0x1)~=g[0X8] or d(cw,0x2)~=g[0X12][0X2] or d(cw,g[0x4][0x5])~=g[0x18] or d(cw,g[0x12][0x6])~=g[0x12][0x4] then while true do end end local cx=c(a(cw,g[12][0X4]))() return cx(...) end)(string.sub,string.gsub,loadstring,string.byte,table.concat,string.char,...)
